extension.name: Reqnroll BDD
extension.description: Adds Reqnroll BDD planning, Gherkin generation, traceability, safe task injection, handoff, and verification to Spec Kit.
extension.author: LoogaCY Studio

commands.name: speckit.reqnroll-bdd.plan
commands.description: Create a BDD test plan from the current Spec Kit feature specification.

commands.name: speckit.reqnroll-bdd.generate
commands.description: Generate Reqnroll-compatible Gherkin files, traceability, and implementation handoff.

commands.name: speckit.reqnroll-bdd.inject-tasks
commands.description: Inject traceable BDD implementation tasks into the active Spec Kit tasks.md file.

commands.name: speckit.reqnroll-bdd.verify
commands.description: Verify BDD coverage, scenario quality, architecture boundaries, and optional test execution.

hooks.prompt: Inject Reqnroll BDD implementation tasks before implementation?
hooks.description: Inject BDD acceptance test tasks into tasks.md before implementation
